Annotation

Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us
The patient shows elevated HbA1c, indicating suboptimal long-term glycemic control (prediabetes/early diabetes). Creatinine is mildly elevated, suggesting possible early renal impairment. Lipid profile reveals high total cholesterol and LDL, increasing cardiovascular risk. Glucose, urea, electrolytes, and triglycerides are within normal limits. Recommend further evaluation and management of glycemic control, renal function, and dyslipidemia.
